title: Jeffrey Mcmahon
compiled_truth: Jeffrey Mcmahon is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-28), Jeffrey Mcmahon sent 23 and received 916 emails, totalling 939 interactions. Top correspondents: [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (9), [Raymond Bowen](people/raymond-bowen) (6), [Mark Frevert](people/mark-frevert) (5), [Sally Beck](people/sally-beck) (3), [Rick Buy](people/rick-buy) (3).
